news.title:
SBI corrects bond allotment from 1 crore to 6,051 bonds with 1 crore face value each.
The 7.05% coupon rate bonds are non-convertible, taxable, redeemable, and unsecured Tier 2 under Basel III.
news.summary:
SBI corrects bond allotment from 1 crore to 6,051 bonds with 1 crore face value each.
The 7.05% coupon rate bonds are non-convertible, taxable, redeemable, and unsecured Tier 2 under Basel III.

news.title:
Nomura warns Indian banks' margins to face pressure as deposit growth lags credit growth, impacting profitability and NIM recovery.
Nomura highlights ICICI, Axis as top picks; maintains 'Buy' on HDFC, Kotak, SBI, and others with revised target prices cut by 2-24%.
news.summary:
Nomura warns Indian banks' margins to face pressure as deposit growth lags credit growth, impacting profitability and NIM recovery.
Nomura highlights ICICI, Axis as top picks; maintains 'Buy' on HDFC, Kotak, SBI, and others with revised target prices cut by 2-24%.

news.title:
SBI executed a block trade of ~384,256 shares at Rs. 1039.8.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 39.95 crores.
news.summary:
SBI executed a block trade of ~384,256 shares at Rs. 1039.8.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 39.95 crores.

news.title:
SBI's valuation shifted from very expensive to expensive, signaling recalibrated price attractiveness.
SBI outperformed Sensex across timeframes; analysis compares its valuation with public sector peers.
news.summary:
SBI's valuation shifted from very expensive to expensive, signaling recalibrated price attractiveness.
SBI outperformed Sensex across timeframes; analysis compares its valuation with public sector peers.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Bank, SBI, Tata Motors, LIC Housing Finance, Union Bank highlighted.
Focus includes corporate announcements and IPO details for trading session.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Bank, SBI, Tata Motors, LIC Housing Finance, Union Bank highlighted.

news.title:
HDFC Bank led a ₹1 tn market cap erosion among top 5 firms; Sensex dipped 0.04%.
Reliance Industries gained ₹45.9k cr, while Bharti Airtel, SBI, LIC, Infosys also rose.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank led a ₹1 tn market cap erosion among top 5 firms; Sensex dipped 0.04%.
Reliance Industries gained ₹45.9k cr, while Bharti Airtel, SBI, LIC, Infosys also rose.

news.title:
SBI evacuated 64 employees from UAE, Bahrain, and Israel to Mumbai amid West Asia conflict, maintaining minimal local presence.
UAE and Bahrain contribute 7% and 8% to SBI's international loan portfolio; operations now managed remotely from India.
news.summary:
SBI evacuated 64 employees from UAE, Bahrain, and Israel to Mumbai amid West Asia conflict, maintaining minimal local presence.
UAE and Bahrain contribute 7% and 8% to SBI's international loan portfolio; operations now managed remotely from India.

news.title:
Retail loan GNPAs in FY26 are being curtailed by major banks.
RBI flagged risky practices, causing bad loans in retail portfolios.
news.summary:
Retail loan GNPAs in FY26 are being curtailed by major banks.
RBI flagged risky practices, causing bad loans in retail portfolios.

news.title:
SBI received a tax demand of ₹6,337.5 Cr including interest for AY 2023-24.
The bank plans to contest the order; no operational impact expected.
news.summary:
SBI received a tax demand of ₹6,337.5 Cr including interest for AY 2023-24.
The bank plans to contest the order; no operational impact expected.

news.title:
PSU bank stocks, including SBI and Canara Bank, rose up to 5% amid stock market rebound.
Nifty PSU Bank index gained 3.8% intraday, driven by easing crude prices and broader market optimism.
news.summary:
PSU bank stocks, including SBI and Canara Bank, rose up to 5% amid stock market rebound.
Nifty PSU Bank index gained 3.8% intraday, driven by easing crude prices and broader market optimism.

news.title:
SBI and Amundi to offload 10% stake in SBI Funds IPO; no fresh shares issued.
SBI Funds, India's largest asset manager, reported FY25 net profit of ₹2,531 crore.
news.summary:
SBI and Amundi to offload 10% stake in SBI Funds IPO; no fresh shares issued.
SBI Funds, India's largest asset manager, reported FY25 net profit of ₹2,531 crore.

news.title:
CBI questioned Anil Ambani for 8 hours in Rs 2,929 cr cheating case.
Case involves Reliance Communications and SBI's complaint against the company.
news.summary:
CBI questioned Anil Ambani for 8 hours in Rs 2,929 cr cheating case.
Case involves Reliance Communications and SBI's complaint against the company.

news.title:
SBI Funds Management Ltd filed draft prospectus for IPO, offering 203.7M shares.
SBI plans to sell 6.3% stake, and Amundi India Holding 3.7%, pending approvals.
news.summary:
SBI Funds Management Ltd filed draft prospectus for IPO, offering 203.7M shares.
SBI plans to sell 6.3% stake, and Amundi India Holding 3.7%, pending approvals.

news.title:
PSBs are gaining traction in MSME loans, led by SBI, supported by competitive pricing and CGTMSE guarantees.
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and SBI are Motilal Oswal's top picks; home loan growth drives PSU competitiveness.
news.summary:
PSBs are gaining traction in MSME loans, led by SBI, supported by competitive pricing and CGTMSE guarantees.
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and SBI are Motilal Oswal's top picks; home loan growth drives PSU competitiveness.

news.title:
SBI-led lenders approach SC for ₹5,100 cr deposited by Sterling Biotech.
Lenders highlight ₹19,283.8 cr outstanding against Sterling Biotech Group firms.
news.summary:
SBI-led lenders approach SC for ₹5,100 cr deposited by Sterling Biotech.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and Infosys were top mutual fund buys in February, while SBI and Bajaj Finance saw selling.
Mutual funds remain overweight on pharma, e-commerce, and capital goods, while underweight on private banks, oil & gas, and IT services.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and Infosys were top mutual fund buys in February, while SBI and Bajaj Finance saw selling.
Mutual funds remain overweight on pharma, e-commerce, and capital goods, while underweight on private banks, oil & gas, and IT services.

news.title:
SBI raised ₹6,051 cr via Basel III Tier 2 bonds at 7.1% p.a.
Bonds have a 10-year tenor, call options after 5 years, oversubscribed 2x.
news.summary:
SBI raised ₹6,051 cr via Basel III Tier 2 bonds at 7.1% p.a.
Bonds have a 10-year tenor, call options after 5 years, oversubscribed 2x.

news.title:
MFs increased exposure to private banks in Feb; SBI saw reduced investments.
HDFC Bank received Rs 7,000 cr inflows, leading private sector banking investments.
news.summary:
MFs increased exposure to private banks in Feb; SBI saw reduced investments.
HDFC Bank received Rs 7,000 cr inflows, leading private sector banking investments.

news.title:
SBI plans to raise ₹75B ($811M) via Tier-II bonds, bankers report.
This marks SBI's second rupee debt issuance in FY24.
news.summary:
SBI plans to raise ₹75B ($811M) via Tier-II bonds, bankers report.
This marks SBI's second rupee debt issuance in FY24.

news.title:
Valuation gap between PSU and private banks narrows as PSU banks show steady P/E ratios and outperform private peers.
PSU bank index gained 47.3% YoY vs 6.5% for private banks; SBI rose 8.7%, while HDFC Bank fell 18.6% Dec-Mar.
news.summary:
Valuation gap between PSU and private banks narrows as PSU banks show steady P/E ratios and outperform private peers.
PSU bank index gained 47.3% YoY vs 6.5% for private banks; SBI rose 8.7%, while HDFC Bank fell 18.6% Dec-Mar.
